auth.name: Full name
auth.hasAccount: Already have an account? Log In
auth.logoutMessage: Are you sure you want to log out? Your local data will be kept, but real-time synchronization will be disabled.
auth.recoverMessage: Enter your email to receive a recovery link
auth.fillFields: Please fill in email and password

sync.title: Real-Time Sync
sync.subtitle: Your data is saved in the cloud and automatically synced across all your devices.
sync.backupDesc: Your data is securely saved in the cloud
sync.realtimeDesc: Changes appear on all your devices instantly
sync.accessAnywhereDesc: Use the app on multiple devices without losing data
sync.securityNote: 🔒 Your data is protected with Firebase authentication. Each user has their own private cloud space.
